question: What minimum password length does Northbeam enforce?

sources.title: Northbeam Information Security Policy - ISP-09 (Authentication)
sources.text: Passwords must be at least 12 characters in length and include multiple character types.

mock.claim: Northbeam enforces a minimum password length of 16 characters.
mock.output: Northbeam enforces a minimum password length of 16 characters [S1].

expected: The cited policy requires a 12-character minimum; a '16 characters' figure is unsupported.
why: Numeric claim (16 characters) has no matching figure in the cited source, which states a 12-character minimum.
